name: rule-engine closed-loop step cache-hit verifies a re-run of the same rule on the same content reads from cache
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/closed-loop-test.sh" --step cache-hit --rule-id no-eval --content-hash abc --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'cache_lookup_invoked=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
